todays_post.title: LinkedIn Post Draft — 2026-03-14
todays_post.content:
# LinkedIn Post Draft — 2026-03-14

## Status
- [ ] Draft
- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Published

## Post

**Something to think about:**

In 2025, I led a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals in Saudi Arabia.

The hardest part wasn't the technology.

It was changing how 5,000 people thought about their jobs.

Healthcare isn't broken. It just needs to think differently about what "done" looks like.

If you're in the middle of a transformation, the question isn't "are we moving fast enough?"

It's "are we moving in the right direction?"

What's your biggest DT challenge right now?

---

## Metadata
- **Theme:** Healthcare DT leadership
- **Archetype:** Thought leadership / insight
- **Target:** GCC healthcare executives
- **Voice:** Ahmed's executive voice
- **Purpose:** Positioning as healthcare DT leader

posts.title: Vegas, here we come! FortifyData is heading to HIMSS GlobalHealth...
posts.author: Fortifydata
posts.topic: Ashealthcare'sdigitaltransformationaccelerates, cyber resilience is non-negotiable. Stop by our booth to see how our AI-powered platform delivers continuous asset discovery, prioritized risk remediation, automated compliance, and streamlined third-party risk...
posts.ready_comment:
Healthcare cyber resilience isn't just an IT priority, it's a patient safety issue. At TopMed, I saw firsthand how messy things get when you're running a $50M digital transformation across 15 hospitals. That's where continuous asset discovery and automated compliance become actual lifelines for CISOs who are otherwise drowning in manual work.

What's worked for me: finding ways to bring security and clinical teams together without adding friction. Curious how others are tackling this.
